creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Tobias C. Berner from comment #1)

Yes, it is still an issue: I have just tested (on 11.2-RELEASE amd64).

If you thought the bug was fixed because bug #181741 is, observe that it was closed in date 2018-08-17, while I reported the bug in date 2018-10-20.
